title: Slim down README.md and make tutorials page
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

This moves the tutorials down underneath their own page and directory in the docs directory to emulate what we did with Buildah.  In addition I slimmed down README.md to make it a quick read for someone wanting to know about the project.  The commands took up a lot of space so I've moved them to their own page.  We did similar changes with Buildah. The gist is to provide them with high level information on the README,md with the real meat to be found with links from it.

More tutorials are in the works, thus I left the verbiage as plural there.  I plan to create another example based on the examples in the podman run man page.

comments.body: @rhatdan thx, think I just nixed them.  Empty line at the end of two files.
Going to close/reopen to rekick the tests.

:pushpin: Commit 0aa2459 has been approved by `rhatdan`

Merging since this is a docs change only and cento and travis are fine.  Not sure what is broken in the infrastructure.
